The warning is at line 202, column 3 - which is `T` itself. The `eslint-disable-next-line` on the function signature line (line 201) gets removed because lint:fix sees no violation on that line. The actual violation is on line 202 (`T` type parameter). I need to add the disable comment before line 202.

But the function signature spans lines 201-204. The disable-next-line needs to be on the line immediately before the flagged line (202). Line 201 contains the opening `<`. So I need to place the comment so that "next line" is line 202.

The issue with `lint:fix` removing the comment is that when I add it before the function declaration (before line 201), it covers line 201 (`private selectRandomStylesFromCategoriesGeneric<`), not line 202. The warning is on line 202.
